prompt: ​A medium shot of a stylish young woman posing outdoors at an evening festival or fair. She is wearing a white baby tee with red ringer trim, featuring a bold graphic illustration of a roaring tiger on the front with the text "TIGER MIST" printed underneath. She wears a bright red bandana tied around her head, with long, wavy blonde-brown hair cascading down. She has a subtle smile, glowing soft-glam makeup, and a black leather shoulder bag with a gold chain strap draped over her shoulder. In the soft-focus background, a large white Ferris wheel stands against a dusk sky, with a blurred crowd on a grassy field, capturing a lively, aesthetic festival vibe. Natural, soft evening lighting, highly detailed, photorealistic.
